Introduction
    Rati Chakravyuh is a movie starring Mandira Banerjee, Trisha Baura, and Joyraj Bhattacharya. On a lunar eclipse midnight, in a desolate temple, six young newlywed couples and a priestess meet after a mass wedding. They sit in a...
